---
title: "Gapminder EDA 대시보드"
author: "이서진"
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: cosmo
    orientation: rows
    scrolling: false
    embed-resources: true
lang: ko
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
  echo: false
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    dev: "ragg_png"
    dpi: 110
---

```{r setup}
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)
# macOS에서 그래프 내 한글이 깨지지 않도록 한글 폰트 지정
kfont <- if ("AppleGothic" %in% systemfonts::system_fonts()$family) "AppleGothic" else ""
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 12, base_family = kfont))
update_geom_defaults("text", list(family = kfont))

infile <- if (file.exists("data/gapminder.csv")) "data/gapminder.csv" else "../data/gapminder.csv"
df <- read.csv(infile, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
df$continent <- factor(df$continent)
df$totalGDP  <- df$pop * df$gdpPercap
df$logGdp    <- log10(df$gdpPercap)

years   <- sort(unique(df$year))
first_y <- min(years); latest <- max(years); span <- latest - first_y
d_new   <- df[df$year == latest, ]
d_old   <- df[df$year == first_y, ]

wmean <- function(x, wt) sum(x * wt) / sum(wt)
cv    <- function(x) sd(x) / mean(x)

# 핵심 지표 — 기대수명 중심 (value box 3개)
le_2007 <- wmean(d_new$lifeExp, d_new$pop)                    # 2007 인구가중 평균 기대수명
le_gain <- le_2007 - wmean(d_old$lifeExp, d_old$pop)         # 1952→2007 상승폭
le_top  <- d_new$country[which.max(d_new$lifeExp)]           # 최고 기대수명 국가
le_bot  <- d_new$country[which.min(d_new$lifeExp)]           # 최저 기대수명 국가
le_gap  <- max(d_new$lifeExp) - min(d_new$lifeExp)           # 2007 최고−최저 격차

# 회귀 (잔차 표·산점도용)
m  <- lm(lifeExp ~ logGdp, data = d_new)
r2 <- summary(m)$r.squared
d_new$resid <- residuals(m)

# 집계 테이블
agg <- aggregate(cbind(lifeExp, gdpPercap) ~ year + continent, data = df, FUN = mean)
```

# 개요 {orientation="rows"}

## Row {height="22%"}

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "2007년 기대수명 (인구가중 평균)"
list(icon = "heart-pulse", color = "primary",
     value = paste0(round(le_2007, 1), "세"))
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "기대수명 상승 (1952→2007)"
list(icon = "graph-up-arrow", color = "success",
     value = paste0("+", round(le_gain, 1), "세"))
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "기대수명 격차 (2007, 최고−최저)"
list(icon = "arrows-expand", color = "warning",
     value = paste0(round(le_gap, 1), "세"))
```

## Row {height="78%"}

### Column {width="58%"}

```{r}
#| title: "1인당 GDP vs 기대수명 + 회귀선 (2007, 점 크기=인구)"
ggplot(d_new, aes(gdpPercap, lifeExp)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(aes(color = continent, size = pop), alpha = 0.75) +
  scale_x_log10(labels = scales::comma) +
  scale_size(range = c(1, 12), guide = "none") +
  labs(subtitle = paste0("R² = ", round(r2, 3), " · 회귀선 위/아래 = 소득 대비 장수/단명"),
       x = "1인당 GDP (log10)", y = "기대수명", color = "대륙")
```

### Column {width="42%"}

```{r}
#| title: "연도별 국가 간 기대수명 격차 (최장수국 − 최단명국)"
do.call(rbind, lapply(years, function(y) {
  s  <- df[df$year == y, ]
  hi <- s[which.max(s$lifeExp), ]
  lo <- s[which.min(s$lifeExp), ]
  data.frame(연도 = y,
             최장수국 = hi$country, `최고(세)` = round(hi$lifeExp, 1),
             최단명국 = lo$country, `최저(세)` = round(lo$lifeExp, 1),
             `격차(세)` = round(hi$lifeExp - lo$lifeExp, 1),
             check.names = FALSE)
})) |> kable(row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#| title: "대륙별 평균 1인당 GDP 추세 (로그)"
ggplot(agg, aes(year, gdpPercap, color = continent)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) + geom_point(size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_log10(labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(x = "연도", y = "1인당 GDP (log10)", color = "대륙")
```

# 분포 · 대륙

## Row

### Column {.tabset}

```{r}
#| title: "기대수명 분포"
ggplot(df, aes(lifeExp)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(density)), bins = 30, fill = "#2c7fb8", color = "white") +
  geom_density(color = "#08306b", linewidth = 0.8) +
  labs(x = "기대수명", y = "밀도")
```

```{r}
#| title: "1인당 GDP 분포 (로그)"
ggplot(df, aes(gdpPercap)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "#de2d26", color = "white") +
  scale_x_log10(labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(x = "1인당 GDP (log10)", y = "빈도")
```

```{r}
#| title: "분포의 시간 변화"
ggplot(df, aes(lifeExp, group = year, color = year)) +
  geom_density(linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "C") +
  labs(x = "기대수명", y = "밀도", color = "연도")
```

### Column {.tabset}

```{r}
#| title: "대륙별 기대수명 (2007)"
ggplot(d_new, aes(continent, lifeExp, fill = continent)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.5, outlier.shape = NA, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5, size = 1, show.legend = FALSE) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "기대수명")
```

```{r}
#| title: "대륙별 1인당 GDP (2007, 로그)"
ggplot(d_new, aes(continent, gdpPercap, fill = continent)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.5, outlier.shape = NA, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5, size = 1, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_y_log10(labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "1인당 GDP (log10)")
```

## Row {height="38%"}

```{r}
#| title: "대륙별 요약 — 중심과 내부 이질성(변동계수 CV), 2007"
do.call(rbind, lapply(levels(df$continent), function(cont) {
  s <- d_new[d_new$continent == cont, ]
  data.frame(대륙 = cont, 국가수 = nrow(s),
             `기대수명 중앙값` = round(median(s$lifeExp), 1), `기대수명 CV` = round(cv(s$lifeExp), 3),
             `GDP 중앙값` = round(median(s$gdpPercap)), `GDP CV` = round(cv(s$gdpPercap), 3),
             check.names = FALSE)
})) |> kable()
```

# 수렴 · 성장

## Row

### Column {width="50%"}

```{r}
#| title: "σ-수렴: 국가 간 분산 추이 (1952=100)"
disp <- data.frame(
  year      = years,
  idx_life  = sapply(years, function(y) sd(df$lifeExp[df$year == y])) ,
  idx_gdp   = sapply(years, function(y) sd(df$logGdp[df$year == y]))
)
disp$idx_life <- 100 * disp$idx_life / disp$idx_life[1]
disp$idx_gdp  <- 100 * disp$idx_gdp  / disp$idx_gdp[1]
disp_long <- rbind(
  data.frame(year = disp$year, idx = disp$idx_life, 지표 = "기대수명 분산"),
  data.frame(year = disp$year, idx = disp$idx_gdp,  지표 = "로그소득 분산")
)
ggplot(disp_long, aes(year, idx, color = 지표)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) + geom_point(size = 1.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 100, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey60") +
  labs(subtitle = "100 미만 = 격차 축소(수렴), 초과 = 격차 확대",
       x = "연도", y = "분산 지수", color = NULL)
```

### Column {width="50%"}

```{r}
#| title: "소득 성장(CAGR) vs 수명 개선"
g <- merge(d_old[, c("country","continent","gdpPercap","lifeExp")],
           d_new[, c("country","gdpPercap","lifeExp")],
           by = "country", suffixes = c("_old","_new"))
g$cagr      <- (g$gdpPercap_new / g$gdpPercap_old)^(1 / span) - 1
g$life_gain <- g$lifeExp_new - g$lifeExp_old
ggplot(g, aes(cagr*100, life_gain, color = continent)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey70") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "grey70") +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.75, size = 2, show.legend = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "GDP 연평균성장률 (%)", y = "기대수명 증가폭 (세)")
```

## Row {height="40%"}

### Column {.tabset}

```{r}
#| title: "소득 대비 단명 (음의 잔차)"
ord <- order(d_new$resid)
head(d_new[ord, c("country","gdpPercap","lifeExp","resid")], 6) |>
  setNames(c("국가","1인당 GDP","실제 수명","잔차(세)")) |>
  kable(digits = 1, row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#| title: "소득 대비 장수 (양의 잔차)"
head(d_new[rev(ord), c("country","gdpPercap","lifeExp","resid")], 6) |>
  setNames(c("국가","1인당 GDP","실제 수명","잔차(세)")) |>
  kable(digits = 1, row.names = FALSE)
```

### Column {.tabset}

```{r}
#| title: "최고 성장 5개국 (CAGR)"
head(g[order(-g$cagr), ], 5) |>
  (\(x) data.frame(국가 = x$country, 대륙 = x$continent,
                   `CAGR(%)` = round(x$cagr*100, 2), check.names = FALSE))() |>
  kable(row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#| title: "기대수명 역행 사례"
ds <- df[order(df$country, df$year), ]
ds$delta <- ave(ds$lifeExp, ds$country, FUN = function(x) c(NA, diff(x)))
drops <- ds[!is.na(ds$delta) & ds$delta < 0, ]
big <- head(drops[order(drops$delta), c("country","year","delta","continent")], 6)
big$continent <- as.character(big$continent)
setNames(big, c("국가","연도","변화(세)","대륙")) |>
  kable(digits = 1, row.names = FALSE)
```
